sections.paragraph:
Original: כּר

Transliteration: kôr

Phonetic: kore

BDB Definition:

  1. kor, a measure (usually dry)
    1. a dry or liquid measure equal to 10 ephahs or baths
      1. a dry measure containing 6.25 bushels (220 liters)
      2. a liquid measure of 58 gallons (263 liters)

Origin: from the same as H3564

TWOT entry: 1031

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
